title: Up Your Vision
description: This year, Eurovision carries on as usual - and while the UK stays in, Brighton knows better! Despite its ongoing ethnic cleansing of Palestinians, Israel remains in the competition whilst Russia has been excluded since 2022 for its invasion of Ukraine. The double standard is clear. And we’re not the only ones calling it out: Iceland, Ireland, Norway, Spain, Slovenia, and the Netherlands have withdrawn from Eurovision this year in protest. So we’re doing something different: Up Your Vision! is our joyful, defiant alternative. Expect a raucous evening of live music and comedy chaos, with a fancy dress glam station, prizes, and a secret after party from the awesome Queer House Party DJ’s. Hosted by Brighton’s own brilliant Jen Brister and featuring live music from Palestinian pop royalty Bashar Murad, Oceana, The Liberation Choir, waymore, The Unkempt Skiffle Band, Go For It Tribe, Merlin Shepherd, Nil Points Doors open 5:30 pm. Show will start promptly at 6 pm.
content_warnings: Warnings: spicy language, limited seating, optional fancy dress

venue.name: Klub Kaput at Caravanserai
venue.address: North of St Peter's Church, York Place, East Sussex
